turns.name: KARAS
turns.text: Thank you. Mr. Chief Justice, and may In the three cases before this Court for decision, to the decision in Wainwright v. Sykes. Sykes is to have any meaning, it The facts in our case are relatively simple. On January 1, 1974, the legislature enacted Ohio QUESTION* Was this special legislation or was it NR. KARAS* It was part of a code revision. There Now, on July 21, 1976, the Ohio Supreme Court The three cases before the Court all occurred The decision in State v. Robinson was subsequently held retroactive to all cases that had been tried after January 1, 1974, which was the date that the statute took place. ?.t none of the trials did the defendants object to the traditional instruction that the defendant bore the burden of proof by preponderance of the evidence, but if he failed to prove that defense by that burden, the state still bore the burden of proof as to all the elements of the crime beyond a reasonable doubt.
